query: What is Elon Musk's current net worth according to Bloomberg Billionaires Index in early July 2026? Has it recovered above $1 trillion after the late June 2026 tech selloff? Include recent Tesla and SpaceX share price and valuation trajectory.
answer:
Research complete. Here's the summary:

**Bottom line:** As of the most recent Bloomberg Billionaires Index reading (**July 10, 2026**), Elon Musk's net worth was **~$913 billion — below $1 trillion**. He has **NOT recovered above $1 trillion** after the late-June 2026 tech selloff, and the decline appeared to still be ongoing.

**Key findings:**
- Musk became the first-ever trillionaire on June 12, 2026 (SpaceX IPO day), peaking at an intraday ~$1.4T (Bloomberg record high ~$1.32T).
- He fell below $1T around June 24–25 (~$946–957B) and is now down **>$407 billion** from the high.
- **SpaceX (SPCX) is the main driver**, not Tesla. SPCX peaked at $225.64 on June 16, crashed 16.4% on June 22, and hit a fresh post-IPO low of **$139.25 on July 13** (−4.2% that day, ~38% below peak). Musk owns ~42%.
- **Tesla (TSLA)** is more resilient: **$397.79 on July 13** (−2.45%), ~20% below its 52-week high; it dipped to $375–382 during the selloff, briefly hit $425 on July 1, then drifted back.
- Musk remains the world's richest person by a wide margin (wealthier than Page, Brin, and Bezos combined).

One lower-reliability third-party tracker estimated ~$1.02T on July 13, but the authoritative Bloomberg figure places him clearly below the trillion-dollar threshold.

sources.title: Wealth of Elon Musk
sources.snippet: Elon Musk is the wealthiest person in the world, with an estimated net worth of US$913 billion according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index and $917 billion according to Forbes, as of July 10, 2026.

sources.title: Musk's Net Worth Down $407 Billion From Trillion-Plus High as SpaceX Stock Dives
sources.snippet: Elon Musk's net worth has dropped to $913 billion, a decline of more than $407 billion from its record high of $1.32 trillion. SpaceX dropped from a record high of $225 on June 16 to $145 on Friday.

sources.title: Initial public offering of SpaceX
sources.snippet: The IPO of SpaceX occurred on June 12, 2026. It was the largest ever IPO, at a valuation of US$1.77 trillion. On the first trading day, the company reached a market capitalization of about $2.1 trillion.

sources.title: SpaceX IPO: Market cap tops $2 trillion after shares gain 19%
sources.snippet: SpaceX shares soared, propelling valuation above $2 trillion; stock jumped more than 19% to $160.95, market value roughly $2.1 trillion.

sources.title: Elon Musk's Net Worth Drops $350 Billion In Massive SpaceX Selloff
sources.snippet: SpaceX plunged 16.4% on Monday to under $155; stock sank more than 31% since hitting a peak of $225.64 on June 16, dropping Musk's net worth from an all-time high of $1.45 trillion.

sources.title: Elon Musk No Longer a Trillionaire: Net Worth Falls to $946 Billion
sources.snippet: The Bloomberg Billionaires Index reported his fortune at $946 billion as of Wednesday, a decline from roughly $1.11 trillion.

sources.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as Tesla and SpaceX drops, net worth falls to $957 billion
sources.snippet: Less than two weeks after becoming the first person to cross the $1 trillion mark, Musk has fallen back below it after a sharp market sell-off.

sources.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as tech rout hammers Tesla, SpaceX
sources.snippet: Musk remains the world's richest person by a wide margin, with Larry Page a distant second at $296B.

sources.title: The Top 10 Richest People In The World | July 2026
sources.snippet: Only two of the world's ten wealthiest people got richer over the past month amid a broad sell-off of tech stocks.

sources.title: The World's First Trillionaire and the Company He Won't Let Go
sources.snippet: Bloomberg feature on Musk as first trillionaire and SpaceX.

key_facts: Bloomberg Billionaires Index put Elon Musk's net worth at ~$913 billion as of July 10, 2026 — below $1 trillion.
Forbes had Musk at ~$917 billion on the same date (July 10, 2026).
Musk became the first-ever verified trillionaire on June 12, 2026, upon SpaceX's IPO.
Musk's net worth peaked at an intraday ~$1.4-1.45 trillion the week after the IPO; Bloomberg cites a record high of ~$1.32 trillion.
Musk's fortune is down more than $407 billion from its trillion-plus high, per Bloomberg data cited by Benzinga.
Musk fell below $1 trillion around June 24-25, 2026, with Bloomberg reporting ~$946 billion (some outlets cited $957 billion).
He has NOT durably recovered above $1 trillion; his wealth has frequently stayed under $1T since late June 2026.
SpaceX (SPCX) IPO on June 12, 2026 was the largest in history at a ~$1.77 trillion valuation, raising $86 billion; first-day market cap ~$2.1 trillion.
SPCX peaked at ~$225.64 on June 16, 2026, then fell 16.4% on June 22 to under $155.
SPCX closed at $139.25 on July 13, 2026 (-4.16% on the day), a fresh post-IPO low, ~38% below its June 16 peak; market cap ~$1.83 trillion.
Tesla (TSLA) closed at $397.79 on July 13, 2026 (-2.45%), market cap ~$1.49 trillion, ~20% below its 52-week high of $498.83.
SpaceX (Musk owns ~42%), not Tesla, is the primary driver of the net worth decline.
Musk remains the world's richest person, wealthier than Larry Page, Sergey Brin, and Jeff Bezos combined; Larry Page was a distant second (~$296B).
